analysis: The genetic algorithm implementations have shown promise but continue to fail due to syntax errors. The differential evolution algorithm and reinforcement learning approaches were not attempted yet. There is potential in refining the genetic algorithm's parameters and incorporating adaptive mutation rates.

assignments.direction: Implement a differential evolution algorithm for job scheduling.
Refine the genetic algorithm by incorporating adaptive mutation rates.
Develop a reinforcement learning approach using Q-learning for job scheduling.
Fine-tune the parameters of the simulated annealing algorithm using a grid search.
Combine the strengths of genetic algorithms and ant colony optimization.
Try a novel heuristic approach not yet explored
Combine the two best approaches seen so far
Try the opposite of what has been working to preserve diversity
Focus on reducing maximum tardiness before total tardiness
Try a randomized approach with multiple restarts
